title: Kyrf
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Kyrf''' was a [[Fruit/Legends|fruit]] grown on [[Korbin]], and, if fermented, an [[Alcohol/Legends|alcoholic]] [[Kyrf (liquor)|beverage]]. [[Cross-Galactic Mining]], although primarily a [[Mining/Legends|mining]] corporation, handled the exportation of kyrf, which was produced exclusively by [[Drelmar Bin]]'s kyrf plantation. The kyrf fruit was grown on green trees that somehow thrived in arid conditions. The fruit itself was metallic [[Gold/Legends|gold]] in [[Color/Legends|color]] and oval in shape.

{{Food-stub}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 1992-06-XX -->''[[Planets of the Galaxy, Volume Two]]''
